/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ThPool.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libThPool.so -o /home/m0nisa/SocketWithThreadPool/ThreadPool/libThPool.so CMakeFiles/ThPool.dir/cpps/Task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ThPool.dir/cpps/TaskQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ThPool.dir/cpps/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ThPool.dir/cpps/test.cpp.o
